TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Salitung ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 268 buwan, 777 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 394 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 383 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 48%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Salitung ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Salitung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Salitung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Salitung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Salitung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Salitung hya' ga Naihunpu. tay mkyahu' na Salitung hya' ga Sinapalan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕalituŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ s~ɕalituŋ ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa naiħunpu. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinapalan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Salitung ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 268 buwan, 777 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 394 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 383 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 48%, Tayan 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. qalang Salitung ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Salitung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Salitung hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Salitung hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Salitung hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Salitung hya' ga Naihunpu. tay mkyahu' na Salitung hya' ga Sinapalan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕalituŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. qalaŋ s~ɕalituŋ ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa naiħunpu. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕalituŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕinapalan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
